title: The '$3/Day' Trick That Costs You $51,000
hook: Every subscription, gym membership, and app pitches itself as 'just a few dollars a day' — and that framing is engineered to make you blind to the real price tag.
angle: Exposes the daily-price framing trick marketers use to bypass your brain's large-number alarm, then stacks six common 'trivial' daily costs to reveal a $51,000 long-term wealth loss.
audience: Anyone who pays for subscriptions, memberships, or apps — which is basically everyone under 45
key_numbers: $51,000 lost over 10 years if invested at 7% instead
